# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  NODE_VERSION: '18'

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}
      build-time: ${{ steps.set-version.outputs.build-time }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Set version and build time
        id: set-version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty)
          BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-time=${BUILD_TIME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Version: ${VERSION}"
          echo "Build Time: ${BUILD_TIME}"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Create build manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/build-manifest.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.set-version.outputs.version }}",
            "buildTime": "${{ steps.set-version.outputs.build-time }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "workflow": "${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: |
            dist/
            package.json
            deployment/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: |
            coverage/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 7

  verify-artifacts:
    name: Verify Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact structure
        run: |
          echo "Verifying artifact structure..."
          test -d artifacts/dist || (echo "dist directory not found" && exit 1)
          test -f artifacts/dist/build-manifest.json || (echo "build-manifest.json not found" && exit 1)
          test -f artifacts/package.json || (echo "package.json not found" && exit 1)
          echo "All required files present"

      - name: Display build manifest
        run: |
          echo "Build Manifest:"
          cat artifacts/dist/build-manifest.json

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, verify-artifacts]
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main')
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./deploy

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up staging environment..."
          mkdir -p $HOME/.ssh
          echo "${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}" > $HOME/.ssh/deploy_key
          chmod 600 $HOME/.ssh/deploy_key

      - name: Pre-deployment health check
        run: |
          echo "Running pre-deployment checks..."
          curl -f https://staging.example.com/health || echo "Service may be down"

      - name: Execute deployment script
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          DEPLOY_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}
        run: |
          cd deploy
          if [ -f deployment/deploy-staging.sh ]; then
            chmod +x deployment/deploy-staging.sh
            ./deployment/deploy-staging.sh
          else
            echo "Deployment script not found, using default deployment"
            echo "Deploying version $DEPLOY_VERSION to $DEPLOY_ENV"
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        run: |
          echo "Waiting for service to be ready..."
          sleep 10
          curl -f https://staging.example.com/health || (echo "Health check failed" && exit 1)
          echo "Staging deployment successful"

      - name: Notify deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Deployment to staging completed with status: ${{ job.status }}"

  integration-tests:
    name: Run Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy-staging
    if: success()
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout test suite
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup test environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Install test dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci
          npm install -g newman

      - name: Run integration tests
        env:
          TEST_URL: https://staging.example.com
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          echo "Running integration tests against staging..."
          npm run test:integration

      - name: Upload test reports
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: integration-test-results
          path: test-results/integration/
          retention-days: 14

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, integration-tests]
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./deploy

      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up production environment..."
          mkdir -p $HOME/.ssh
          echo "${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY }}" > $HOME/.ssh/deploy_key
          chmod 600 $HOME/.ssh/deploy_key

      - name: Create backup
        env:
          BACKUP_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          BACKUP_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
        run: |
          echo "Creating backup before deployment..."
          timestamp=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
          echo "Backup created: backup_${timestamp}"

      - name: Pre-deployment health check
        run: |
          echo "Running pre-deployment checks..."
          curl -f https://example.com/health || (echo "Production health check failed" && exit 1)

      - name: Execute production deployment
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          DEPLOY_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_PATH }}
        run: |
          cd deploy
          if [ -f deployment/deploy-production.sh ]; then
            chmod +x deployment/deploy-production.sh
            ./deployment/deploy-production.sh
          else
            echo "Deployment script not found, using default deployment"
            echo "Deploying version $DEPLOY_VERSION to $DEPLOY_ENV"
          fi

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        run: |
          echo "Waiting for service to stabilize..."
          sleep 15
          for i in {1..5}; do
            if curl -f https://example.com/health; then
              echo "Health check passed"
              break
            fi
            if [ $i -eq 5 ]; then
              echo "Health check failed after 5 attempts"
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "Retry $i/5..."
            sleep 10
          done

      - name: Smoke tests
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke tests..."
          curl -f https://example.com/ || (echo "Smoke test failed" && exit 1)
          echo "Production deployment verified"

      - name: Tag release
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Creating release tag for version ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"

  rollback-production:
    name: Rollback Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy-production
    if: failure() && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production-rollback
    
    steps:
      - name: Execute rollback procedure
        env:
          ROLLBACK_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          ROLLBACK_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
        run: |
          echo "Initiating production rollback..."
          echo "Rolling back to previous version"

      - name: Verify rollback
        run: |
          sleep 10
          curl -f https://example.com/health || (echo "Rollback verification failed" && exit 1)
          echo "Rollback completed successfully"

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup and Notification
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [deploy-staging, deploy-production]
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Clean up old artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Cleanup process initiated..."
          echo "Workflow completed"

      - name: Send deployment notification
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Deployment pipeline completed successfully"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          echo "Build Time: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-time }}"
